description: Primary fixed-time solver3 broad multiseed autoresearch metric. Each canonical problem contributes through the mean final score across four explicit seeds, normalized by the checked-in reference baseline, then averaged with equal weight and scaled by 100.
weighting_note: All ten canonical solver3 broad-lane cases currently use equal weight 1.0, so the primary metric is 100 times the arithmetic mean of the ten per-case normalized multiseed means.
